channel.title: misc on Hexomedine
channel.description: Recent content in misc on Hexomedine

item.title: [Root-Me 10k CTF] Misc - White Rabbit
item.description: The challenge In this challenge, we had to exploit a discord bot. In fact, there was an OS command injection in the bot. Here’s the description : Write-Up The purpose of the bot is to check if a root-me challenge domain is up. So we can DM the bot and see what’s what. The normal behavior of the bot is represented below. As I’ve done this type of challenges before, this challenge screams “OS command injection” to me.
